agents.description: Classifies and prioritises inbound tickets across severity and product surface
Drafts first-response replies citing relevant docs for human review
Inspects bug-report traces and routes likely defects to #ops

bench.name: support-response-bench
bench.description: Measures first-response latency and classification accuracy over the past 24h
successCriteria: First-response draft within 2h of ticket open
Escalations routed within 30 min of P1 classification
